readme:
# TodoAPI

A small REST API for managing todos with JWT auth. Built with Express and SQLite.

key_files.content:
import rateLimit from 'express-rate-limit';
export const apiLimiter = rateLimit({ windowMs: 60_000, max: 100 });

recent_commits.author: Dana
recent_commits.message: Add express-rate-limit middleware after auth abuse in staging

recent_commits.author: Sam
recent_commits.message: Refactor auth into src/middleware/auth.js (was inline in server.js)

recent_commits.author: Dana
recent_commits.message: Add JWT auth middleware and /auth login route

recent_commits.author: Sam
recent_commits.message: Switch DB layer to better-sqlite3 after node-sqlite3 build failures on CI

recent_commits.author: Dana
recent_commits.message: Add /todos CRUD routes and integration tests

recent_commits.author: Leo
recent_commits.message: Migration 002: add user_id column to todos for per-user scoping

recent_pull_requests.title: Extract JWT auth into middleware
recent_pull_requests.author: dana
recent_pull_requests.body: Auth logic was duplicated across routes. This PR moves verification into src/middleware/auth.js and wraps /todos so every todo endpoint requires a valid Bearer token. Follow-up to incident where unauthenticated clients could list todos.

recent_pull_requests.title: Replace node-sqlite3 with better-sqlite3
recent_pull_requests.author: sam
recent_pull_requests.body: CI kept failing native compiles on Apple Silicon runners. better-sqlite3 ships prebuilds; src/db/index.js now opens a single shared connection used by all routes.
